mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM goods WHERE state = '1'
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods (name, origin, producer, unit, inprice, outprice, goodstypeId, state) VALUES (#{name}, #{origin}, #{producer}, #{unit}, #{inprice}, #{outprice}, #{goodsTypeId}, '1')
mapper.delete: UPDATE goods SET state = '0' WHERE gsid = #{gsid}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM goods WHERE state = '1'
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{msg}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM goods WHERE state = '1'
SELECT * FROM goods WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND state = '1'
